headline: Fire Safety Compliance Below 60% in Commercial Buildings
context: BOMBA audit found only 58% of commercial buildings met fire safety compliance standards as of December 2025.

cards.big: Only 58% of commercial buildings meet fire safety standards
cards.sub: BOMBA audit of 28,000 buildings found 11,760 with significant failures

cards.big: 45% of non-compliant buildings had blocked or locked emergency exits
cards.sub: KL shophouse fire October 2025 killed 8 workers trapped by locked stairwell

cards.big: Sprinkler systems non-functional in 22% of buildings required to have them
cards.sub: Owners cited maintenance cost of RM15,000-40,000 annually as neglect reason

cards.big: BOMBA issued 4,200 closure notices but authorities enforced only 1,800
cards.sub: Political interference cited in 35% of cases where enforcement not carried through

cards.big: Fire safety gaps test whether building regulations protect lives or just exist on paper
Below 60% fire safety compliance in commercial buildings — enforcement gaps become fatal during emergencies.
